mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT kp.* FROM store_celebrity_private_product scpp LEFT JOIN kol_product kp ON kp.id=scpp.product_id
and scpp.relation_status>=0
and scpp.relation_status=1

SELECT a2.id, a2.celebrity_id, b2.brand_id, b2.id AS product_id, b2.brand_name, b2.product_name, a2.relation_status, a2.celebrity_counselor_id, a2.celebrity_counselor_name FROM store_celebrity_private_product a2 LEFT JOIN kol_product b2 ON a2.product_id = b2.id WHERE b2.brand_id IS NOT NULL AND b2.id IS NOT NULL AND b2.brand_name IS NOT NULL AND b2.product_name IS NOT NULL AND a2.celebrity_id IN
#{item}
